title: Claws Reach
description: Allows players to craft the crabs claw from the mob vote (currently only works in the latest snapshot)
body:
Claws reach is a simple datapack where you are able to craft the crabs claw from the minecraft live mob vote.

Currently this ONLY works in the latest snapshot.

The Crabs Claw item has a 3 block extended reach when held in the users offhand.
It can be crafted with 7 copper ingots.
